summary: Comprehensive testing of Task Management module completed. All backend APIs (20/20 tests passed) and frontend UI features verified working correctly. Module includes List view, Kanban Board, Milestones, Labels tabs with full CRUD operations, filters, and task status workflow.
critical_code_review_comments: Task Management module is well-implemented with GitHub-style issue tracking features
All 4 views (List, Board, Milestones, Labels) working correctly
Kanban board supports quick status changes via dropdown menu
Task detail page shows comments, activity log, and sidebar with full task info
Department-based visibility and role-based permissions working correctly
CEO user can access Settings (Labels, Milestones management) as expected
seed_data_creation: One test task 'Fix invoice calculation bug' with Bug label and Q1 2026 Release milestone exists in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Task Management module at /tasks is fully functional. Navigate: Login -> Click 'Tasks' in sidebar under Requests section. Features: List view with table, Kanban Board with 4 columns (Open, In Progress, In Review, Closed), Milestones tab with progress bars, Labels tab (admin only). Task creation dialog has all fields including assignees checkboxes and labels. Task detail page at /tasks/{id} shows comments, activity, and sidebar details.

List_View.table_headers: TASK, STATUS, SEVERITY, DEPARTMENT, ASSIGNEES, DUE DATE, ACTIONS

Kanban_Board.columns: Open, In Progress, In Review, Closed
Kanban_Board.task_cards: Display title, task number, labels, due date, assignees
Kanban_Board.status_change_dropdown: Move to In Progress, Move to In Review, Move to Closed

Task_Creation.fields: Title, Description, Department, Severity, Status, Milestone, Assignees, Labels, Due Date, Due Time, Reminder Date

Task_Detail_Page.header: Task number, status badge, severity badge, title
Task_Detail_Page.quick_actions: In Progress, In Review, Closed buttons
Task_Detail_Page.sidebar: Details (Department, Severity, Milestone, Due Date, Reminder), Assignees, Reporter, Watchers

Milestones_View.milestone_cards: Title, status badge, description, due date, task count, progress bar

Filters.department_filter: All Departments, Admin, Sales, Production, Marketing, Finance, Distribution, HR, IT, Operations
Filters.search: Filters by title, task number, description
